data.title: RED test: ticket_show library dispatch — JSON parity, no exec to ticket-show.sh, sourceability contract
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Test File
tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh

## Test Approach
- Given a temp repo with a ticket, When `ticket show <id>` is called after library dispatch wired, Then JSON output matches the Python reducer output (same fields).
- Given PATH prepended with a sentinel dir containing a fake ticket-show.sh that writes to a counter file, When `ticket show <id>` is invoked, Then counter file is empty (ticket-show.sh NOT exec'd as a subprocess).
- Given sourcing ticket-lib-api.sh in a caller with set -euo pipefail active, When sourced, Then: caller does not abort, no trap EXIT installed on caller, no GIT_DIR/GIT_INDEX_FILE/GIT_WORK_TREE/GIT_COMMON_DIR mutated.

## Test Functions
1. test_ticket_show_via_library_returns_correct_json
2. test_ticket_dispatcher_no_exec_to_show_script
3. test_ticketlib_api_sourceability_strict_mode

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] All 3 test functions present
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh | grep -q "^3$"
- [ ] .test-index RED marker for ticket-lib-api.sh source file
  Verify: grep "ticket-lib-api.sh" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index RED marker for dispatcher no-exec test
  Verify: grep "test-ticket-lib-api.sh \[test_ticket_dispatcher_no_exec_to_show_script\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Tests fail RED before ticket-lib-api.sh exists
  Verify: test ! -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
